title: poa alpina var. frigida
intro: Poa alpina var. frigida, also known as alpine meadow grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Poa alpina var. frigida include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and protect against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal usage.
